description_long: This is a robust stainless steel wristwatch with a round case and a metallic link bracelet. The watch face is black with bold, luminous hour markers and hands, making it highly legible in low-light conditions. The bezel is unidirectional and marked with minute indicators, suggesting a diver-style design. The bracelet features a secure clasp, and the overall construction appears durable and suitable for everyday urban wear. The brand logo and model information are clearly visible on the dial, adding to its authenticity. The watch exudes a sporty yet refined aesthetic, ideal for both casual and professional settings.
description: A stainless steel wristwatch with a black dial, luminous markers, and a metal link bracelet, featuring a diver-style bezel and prominent brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial, luminous markers, hands, and the brand logo clearly visible on the face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and the profile of the metal link bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the bracelet links and the clasp, with the case back partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bracelet, clasp, and the side profile of the watch case.
attribute_brand_logo: Rectangular brand logo with 'CITIZEN' text, located at the top center of the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with large, luminous rectangular and triangular hour markers, bold luminous hands, and a date window at the 4 o'clock position. The bezel features minute markers, and the overall style is sporty and functional, typical of a diver's watch.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, featuring solid links and a secure clasp.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second), luminous markers, and a date window. The display is clear and functional, with no subdials.
attribute_clasp_style: Fold-over clasp with safety, visible on the underside of the bracelet.
